GUILLAUME MOREAU
Data Analyst ‚ÄĒ retail and supply chain
PROFILE
Data analyst with six years of experience turning messy retail data into decisions, specialised in demand forecasting, pricing analytics and self-serve business intelligence for non-technical teams.
WORK EXPERIENCE
Data Analyst ‚ÄĒ Decathlon Digital | Lyon, France | Sep 2021 ‚Äď Present
‚ÄĘ Built Power BI dashboards for store replenishment covering 320 European stores, cutting stockouts 18%
‚ÄĘ Wrote dbt models on Snowflake powering the demand forecast used by 40 planners
‚ÄĘ Ran price-elasticity studies in Python that informed markdown strategy for end-of-season sales
‚ÄĘ Mentored two apprentices and introduced peer review for every analytics notebook
Junior Data Analyst ‚ÄĒ Atos | Lyon, France | Oct 2019 ‚Äď Aug 2021
‚ÄĘ Cleaned and reconciled CRM data for a banking client, deduplicating 2.3M customer records
‚ÄĘ Automated monthly regulatory reports with SQL Server stored procedures, saving 30 hours per cycle
‚ÄĘ Built anomaly alerts on transaction volumes that caught a double-billing incident within hours
Data Analyst Intern ‚ÄĒ Ubisoft | Montreuil, France | Apr 2019 ‚Äď Aug 2019
‚ÄĘ Analysed player retention funnels for two live mobile titles using BigQuery and Looker
PROJECTS
Churn prediction service | Python, scikit-learn, FastAPI | github.com/gmoreau-data/churn
‚ÄĘ Gradient-boosted churn model with SHAP explanations, deployed behind a FastAPI endpoint

‚ÄĘ Public dashboard analysing 8M bikeshare trips in Lyon, featured by the city open-data portal
